title: Christmas Delight (Farmers Delight Addon)
description: Adds christmas foods to farmers delight
body:
Adds lots of memoriable christmas foods, such as sugar cookies, gingerbread cookies and more!



Royal Frosting:
Get 16 diffrent royal frosting colors (for each color of dye), Used in crafting recipes.

 <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Ya_hWFBTbJI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Sugar Cookie:
Just a basic Sugar cookie, but put some frosting on it, and... well now its a frosted Sugar cookie... yeah...

 

Gingerbread cookies: 
The iconic Christmas cookie, Although due to supply shortages you don't use real ginger, It still tastes very similar.
You can also use some diffrent frostings to get some cool designs, But you can also just frost them like normal

 

Marshmallow:
Yup just a little fluffy mallow of goodness.

 

Eggnog:
A nice eggnog (non alcoholic) Sweet and well Sweet, Add a little Cinnamon for some extra spice

 

Candy Cane:
The iconic Christmas candy.

 

Hot Cocoa addons: 
Ever wanted some marshmallows in your Hot Cocoa??? Well now you can, And put a candy cane in there too for some extra points.

 

Chocolate bar: 
Delicious, And unhealthy but some things are worth it.

 

Chocolate coins:
Cut up a Chocolate bar into 6 coins, then wrap it up in real gold!

 

Ice Creams???: (Thanks to StoneLegion For the idea)
Think of it as sweet snow in a bowl, Cause it is... yeah...

 

Cream Cheese and Berry Log: 
Sweet Berries rolled up in a nice rich Cream Cheese.

 

Cinnamon:
Adds a little spice to some dishes, WARNING, DO NOT EAT RAW, WILL CAUSE COMBUSTION!

 

Cinnamon Bun:
A nice, goey, cinnamony, bun of goodness.

 

Credit to Vanret for completely overhauling the textures! 

Check out there curseforge project page

 

Want to check out our New Big Explosives mod that just came out?



For 1.20.1 Forge and Neo Forge, and 1.21.1 Neo Forge

Thats its for now, But be sure to check back in! This mod is still being updated!!!

If you want to review the mod or use it in a video, let us know and we'll add it to the description!



This is insane, we are a Featured Mod!!!
Thanks to everyone who downloaded this mod!!! :D
